creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150087
add missing empty dirs and honor new sort order from make makeplist

From pd log

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DATADIR%%/scripts/vmware
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DATADIR%%/tests
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
